/usr/bin/ar qc libocudu_flexible_o_du_split_8.a CMakeFiles/ocudu_flexible_o_du_split_8.dir/split_8_o_du_application_unit_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_flexible_o_du_split_8.dir/split_8_o_du_factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_flexible_o_du_split_8.dir/split_8_o_du_unit_cli11_schema.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_flexible_o_du_split_8.dir/split_8_o_du_unit_config_validator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_flexible_o_du_split_8.dir/split_8_o_du_unit_config_yaml_writer.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libocudu_flexible_o_du_split_8.a
